mapper.select: select r.*, u.username, u.name, u.phone from user_real_name_auth r left join user u on r.user_id = u.id where r.id = #{id}
select d.*, u.username, u.name, u.phone from user_driver_license_auth d left join user u on d.user_id = u.id where d.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into user_real_name_auth( user_id, real_name, id_number, id_front_image, id_back_image, status, audit_remark, audit_time, create_time ) values ( #{auth.userId}, #{auth.realName}, #{auth.idNumber}, #{auth.idFrontImage}, #{auth.idBackImage}, #{auth.status}, #{auth.auditRemark}, #{auth.auditTime}, now() )
mapper.update: update user_real_name_auth set real_name = #{auth.realName}, id_number = #{auth.idNumber}, id_front_image = #{auth.idFrontImage}, id_back_image = #{auth.idBackImage}, status = #{auth.status}, audit_remark = #{auth.auditRemark}, audit_time = #{auth.auditTime}, update_time = now() where id = #{auth.id}
mapper.insert: insert into user_driver_license_auth( user_id, driver_name, license_number, vehicle_type, valid_start, valid_end, license_front_image, license_back_image, status, audit_remark, audit_time, create_time ) values ( #{auth.userId}, #{auth.driverName}, #{auth.licenseNumber}, #{auth.vehicleType}, #{auth.validStart}, #{auth.validEnd}, #{auth.licenseFrontImage}, #{auth.licenseBackImage}, #{auth.status}, #{auth.auditRemark}, #{auth.auditTime}, now() )
mapper.update: update user_driver_license_auth set driver_name = #{auth.driverName}, license_number = #{auth.licenseNumber}, vehicle_type = #{auth.vehicleType}, valid_start = #{auth.validStart}, valid_end = #{auth.validEnd}, license_front_image = #{auth.licenseFrontImage}, license_back_image = #{auth.licenseBackImage}, status = #{auth.status}, audit_remark = #{auth.auditRemark}, audit_time = #{auth.auditTime}, update_time = now() where id = #{auth.id}
update user set phone = #{phone}, update_time = now() where id = #{userId}
